infoPlist.NSFaceIDUsageDescription: Face ID is used to provide quick, secure biometric login to your account, protecting your private billing and unit access data.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Location access is used only while the app is active to verify your proximity to the main gate for automatic check-in checks and to ensure security log authenticity. We do not track your location in the background.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: Location access is used to verify your proximity to the main gate for automatic check-in checks and to ensure security log authenticity.

plugins.cameraPermission: Camera access is required to scan visitor gate QR codes for rapid entry and to capture photos of maintenance issues when filing job order repair requests.

plugins.photosPermission: Photo library access is required to select and upload payment receipts for PMO billing verification and to upload product images for your bazaar marketplace listings.

plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Location access is used only while the app is active to verify your proximity to the main gate for automatic check-in checks and to ensure security log authenticity. We do not track your location in the background.
